user.bio: A graduate student in Computer Science passionate about AI, machine learning, and deep learning, with a focus on building end-to-end ML pipelines. Experienced in data analysis, feature engineering, model development, and deployment. Published research on automation of driving license tests using computer vision and image processing.

workExperience.description: Assisted students in software engineering, data mining, and healthcare computing courses. Guided students in software design, CI/CD, Docker, and REST API integration. Mentored data processing, feature engineering, and machine learning algorithm implementation.

Built an ETL pipeline for skeletal keypoint extraction from gait videos, using OpenPose and MediaPipe. Applied signal processing and feature engineering to time-series data. Developed and deployed an autism classification model using BiLSTM and CI/CD on AWS with Docker, Flask, and GitHub Actions.

Designed and deployed a Flask web application with REST APIs and AWS S3 integration, improving performance and SEO. Implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions and Docker. Created SQL-driven data workflows and JSON APIs for analytics and data exchange.
